global.description: The ad features a clean and modern design with a focus on a promotional message and call to action.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to sign up for a service with confidence.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: VaultRun logo
elements.description: A stylized logo featuring the word 'VaultRun' in bold, modern typography, set against a blue background.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: A prominent text block that reads 'Save with confidence' in a clear, friendly font, centered in the ad.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: Two abstract geometric shapes, one circular and one square, rendered in a lighter shade of blue, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Promotional headline
elements.description: A bold headline at the bottom of the ad that states 'Fast signup; instant card' in a clean, easy-to-read font.
elements.text_content: Save with confidence Fast signup; instant card

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rectangular button labeled 'Get offer' in white text on a blue background, positioned prominently at the bottom.

elements.label: Price display
elements.description: A small text element showing the price '€9.99' in a simple, bold font, located at the bottom left of the ad.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: An unspecified element that does not clearly fit into the defined roles, possibly a decorative or background feature.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and modern, VaultRun logo, promotional message, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main message is centered, the promotional headline is at the bottom, and the call to action is prominently displayed.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: VaultRun, Save with confidence, Fast signup, instant card, Get offer, €9.99
